front.title: Multiple UDP Source Ports for ESP in UDP Encapsulation

abstract.t: This document specifies a mechanism to improve network path distribution and host receive-queue load distribution for IPsec traffic using ESP in UDP encapsulation [RFC3948]. Using the per- resource Child SA mechanism of [RFC9611], peers negotiate multiple Child SAs each bound to a distinct UDP source port. The resulting variation in UDP source port enables receive-side scaling (RSS) and equal-cost multi-path (ECMP) load balancing, supporting efficient per-CPU IPsec processing. This document specifies the IKEv2 negotiation, NAT traversal behavior, and operational requirements for this mechanism.
